why: CHART: price broke above the all-day 7422-7450 pin band to a new day high (7453.9) on a strong green candle (7439.5->7453.9), momentum +0.16%/5m +0.19%/15m, above VWAP — bullish HH breakout, the transition OUT of the positive-gamma pin. GEX CONFIRM: the 7450 pika (+31M) just flipped from overhead king/resistance to the FLOOR directly beneath price; overhead now clear air until weak 7500 pika (+13.6M, 46pts up) = real floor under + no wall overhead. Invalidation: fall back below 7450 = failed break, exit fast.

FAILED BREAKOUT — price fell back below 7450 (7448.67), hitting my stated invalidation. GEX structure reverted: 7450 flipped from floor back to overhead resistance (+31M) with next floor all the way at 7375; the positive-gamma pin reasserted and sucked the break back in (levels hold). Chart thesis broken + momentum died to +0.02% — exit fast, take the small loss rather than round-trip it.

CHART: after grinding to a +1.1% high (7466), price rolled over and broke DECISIVELY below the all-morning 7450 support shelf — 5-min close at the low 7438.8, below VWAP (7444.5), momentum accelerating down (-0.26%/5m, -0.34%/15m). Failed-high reversal. GEX CONFIRM: 7450 pika (+32M) flipped from floor to overhead RESISTANCE/barney, and the floor structurally vacated to 7375 (63pts of air below, no pika in between) = ceiling above + floor giving way, the short template. Unlike the earlier 1-min whipsaw, this is a 5-min close below the shelf with acceleration. Invalidation: reclaim above 7450 = failed break, exit.

Bank it — the flush stalled: price found footing at 7435-7437 for two candles, 5-min momentum flattened to -0.04%, and positive gamma re-strengthened to +60M (absorption regime reasserting). My momentum-continuation thesis has decayed and the drop stopped far above the 7375 target. Per 0DTE discipline (cap winners / exit when confirming regime flips), take the small gain rather than round-trip it as strong positive gamma pins price back up.
